subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached Us and We have taken cognizance of its contents. We beseech God that He may enable thee to attain unto His love and good-pleasure and make thee steadfast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک و عرفنا ما فیه نسئل الله بان یوفقک علی حبه و رضائه و یثبتک فی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power of prayer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God
